The '''Supervolt''' company was known to produce [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] power cells. At least one [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], was known to use the Supervolt batteries in his lightsaber.

However, these power cells were known to short out easily, as Vader's did while he was dueling the [[Energizer Bunny]]. This led to the Energizer Bunny's victory over Vader as Vader cried out in anguish.

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Energizer Bunny]] was part of a ''Star-Wars''-themed commercial. It showed Darth Vader's lightsaber was powered by Supervolt.
